title: Dashboard
description: The Dashboard provides a centralized overview of platform activity, research assets, and key metrics. It serves as the entry point for navigating to cohort definitions, analyses, data sources, and collaborative workspaces, giving researchers and administrators an at-a-glance view of their work.
tips: Bookmark the Dashboard as your starting point to quickly navigate to recently accessed studies and cohorts.
Monitor the activity feed on the Dashboard to stay informed about updates made by collaborators on shared assets.
Use Dashboard widgets to track the status of long-running analyses and data ingestion jobs without navigating away.
Customize your Dashboard layout to surface the metrics and shortcuts most relevant to your research role.
Check the system notifications panel on the Dashboard for platform maintenance announcements and version updates.
